caribbean.headline: Roatan Heavy Rain and Small Craft Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing sustained northeast winds near 27 kt, seas to 6.0 ft and an ENE swell with a 10 s period. I anticipate heavy showers over Roatan with an 88% rain probability while Grand Cayman has lighter winds near 17 kt; small craft should exercise caution across western Caribbean waters.

mediterranean.headline: NNW Swell and 22 kt Winds Near Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing NNW swell-driven seas to 4.7 ft with 6 s periods and sustained winds reaching 22 kt, creating choppy conditions for small craft. I'm monitoring Athens (Piraeus), where winds are lighter at 10 kt and overall there is less than 10% rain probability across the region.
